name: Mathematics
description: Build fluency with numbers, patterns, logic, and problem solving.

name: Physics
description: Explore motion, forces, energy, and the rules shaping the universe.

name: Chemistry
description: Understand substances, reactions, and how matter transforms.

name: Biology
description: Study living systems, life processes, and how organisms interact.

name: Computer Science
description: Learn computing systems, software design, and computational thinking.

name: History
description: Examine past events, movements, and the people who shaped them.

name: Political Science
description: Analyze institutions, power, governance, and civic systems.

name: Economics
description: Understand incentives, markets, and how resources move through society.

name: Literature
description: Interpret stories, language, voice, and literary craft.
